title: hieracium racemosum subsp. symphytaceum
intro: Hieracium racemosum subsp. symphytaceum is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its yellow flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Hieracium racemosum subsp. symphytaceum include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote healing, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
